name: Lucky's Travel Plaza & Chevron
description: 24-hour I-80 travel plaza in Cisco Grove with a Chevron fuel island, diesel, an attached Subway, restrooms, and a lower overflow lot used for truck parking.

name: Sierra Superstop 13
description: Independent Sierra-Energy fuel stop off I-80 at Dutch Flat offering diesel, a store and deli, propane, and roughly ten truck parking spaces.

name: Donner Pass Commercial Vehicle Enforcement Facility (Truckee Scales)
description: CHP-operated westbound I-80 commercial vehicle weigh and inspection station east of Truckee, staffed 24/7; overnight truck parking is not permitted.

name: Gold Run Rest Area (Eastbound)
description: Caltrans eastbound safety roadside rest area near Gold Run (Exit 144) with restrooms, drinking water, and parking heavily used by long-haul truck drivers.

name: Gold Run Rest Area (Westbound)
description: Caltrans westbound safety roadside rest area near mile 143 (about 0.5 mi west of Gold Run Exit 144) with restrooms, water, and truck-used parking.

name: McCrary's Mobile Tire (I-80 Tire Service)
description: 24/7 mobile commercial-tire repair and replacement service based on the I-80 mountain corridor covering Auburn to Truckee.
